title: Aerial3D
description: Fabric mod that allows players to zoom out in third person to see more.
body:
# Aerial3D

Aerial3D is a fabric mod that allows players to zoom out in third person to see more. Some usecases are: zooming out over a mountain to see a village or zooming out to see more around corners.

Just as a precaution, at times this mod could be considered cheating, so be careful.

# Usage

In third person, click and hold the zoom button (default `C`) and it'll zoom out a little. You can then use scroll wheel to adjust how much you want to see.

License: MIT
